set1: Hi {peerName}, I want to book a trial lesson this week.
Sure, I am available on Thursday and Saturday evening. Which time works for you?
Thursday at 8 PM works for me. I will book it now.
set2: Do you teach beginner communication classes, {peerName}?
Yes, I have a 6-session roadmap for beginners.
Great, I would like to start this week.
set3: I need to improve pronunciation quickly. Can you help?
Yes, I can correct pronunciation live sentence by sentence.
Perfect, I will send my learning goals before class.
set4: What teaching materials do you usually use?
I combine custom slides with practical exercises in every session.
Sounds good, that matches what I need.
set5: Can I book lessons on weekends?
Yes, I still have Saturday morning slots available.
Nice, I will book Saturday at 9 AM.
set6: I want to prepare for job interviews. Do you have experience with that?
Yes, I have coached many learners for interviews.
Awesome, I want to start this week.
set7: Is your fee charged hourly or by package?
It is hourly, and there are discounts for long-term plans.
Then I want to start with a 10-hour package.
set8: Do you assign homework after each class?
Yes, I always give short review tasks after every lesson.
set9: My goal is IELTS 6.5 in 4 months.
That is achievable if we study consistently 3 sessions per week.
Okay, I will arrange my schedule based on that plan.
set10: Can you explain in both English and Vietnamese?
Sure, I can teach bilingually so it is easier to follow.
Thanks {peerName}, that approach fits me well.
